$schema: v2 persona corpus — persona / character-overlay regression cases. Drives the Tier 6 character_id overlay tests in M6 and the per-character isolation guarantees from docs/MEMORY_DESIGN.md §2 Tier 6 ('Puppeteer gap'). Phase status: empty in M0; populate in M6.

expect.character_isolation: boolean — sentiment under character A must not return for character B
expect.recent_mood_slot: string — substring that must appear in the {recent_mood} slot for the active character
